_doc: Final lifetime totals for discontinued platforms. These figures are stable; the only updates needed are if Nintendo/Sony issue a corrected historical number. Source URLs point at the first-party IR disclosures.

source.description: Final lifetime unit figures for discontinued consoles, from first-party IR.

facts.note: Final Nintendo IR figure for the 3DS family. Nintendo no longer updates this line.
Final Nintendo IR figure for Wii U.
Last PS4 lifetime figure Sony broke out separately before rolling PS4 into 'PlayStation platforms' reporting.
